title: G2PLUS White Organza Gift Bags: 10x12CM Clear Mesh Pouches, 100 PCS Organza Jewellery Bags, Small Favour Pouches for Wedding, Birthday Party Supplies
features: 【Material】These gift bags are made of organza, the bags are very tight, but also very permeable for various scents. works great with lavender.
【Size】This jewellery pouches is 10CM*12CM. please allow 0.5-1cm error due to manual measurement. These small favor bags are ideal for wrapping gifts.
【Really well made】These wedding favor bags are really well made, the band at the top edge can be pulled together evenly and well. They are durable and reusable.

【Ideal Gift Bags】The organza bags are very beautiful and make a good gift for small things. Perfect as wedding favor bags, Christmas favor bags, baby shower favor bags, manufactured jewelry bags and lavender bags.

【Variuosly Application】Beautiful organza gift pouchs always bringing more cordiality. These organza bags are perfect for packing small items for wedding favors, candy, christening almonds, Christmas favors, manufactured jewelry. You can also use these organza bags in a garden to put the vines inside for protection from animals.
